title: Pipeline-Op: GDAXIm/NDXm Cleanup T2-T5 (DL-059 propagation)
description:
## Aufgabe

DL-059 hat T1 von altem GDAXIm/NDXm Symbol-Naming bereinigt. T2-T5 muessen propagiert werden, sobald Pipeline-Op-Team das tragen kann.

Quelle: `_OPEN ITEMS.md` § "Aus Audit 2026-05-08 entstandene Items" — letztes Bullet.

## Was zu tun
1. T2-T5 Custom-Symbols pruefen: Welche tragen noch GDAXIm/NDXm-Naming?
2. Symbol-Rename oder -Loeschung gemaess DL-059 Pattern (analog T1)
3. `bases/`-Ordner NICHT loeschen (Hard Rule HR6 — bases/ niemals loeschen)
4. Per Terminal: Test-Backtest mit neuen Namen, evidence in `docs/ops/QUA-NNN_T<N>_GDAXIm_NDXm_cleanup_<date>.md`

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] T2, T3, T4, T5 sauber von altem Naming
- [ ] Test-Backtest pro Terminal mit neuen Namen erfolgreich
- [ ] Evidence-Doc in `docs/ops/`
- [ ] Closeout-Comment mit Commit-Hash + Per-Terminal-Status

## Pfade
- T2-T5: `D:/QM/mt5/T2`, T3, T4, T5
- DL: `decisions/2026-05-?_dl059_*.md` (Referenz-Lookup)
- Worktree: `agents/pipeline-op`

## Constraint
HR16 — sequenziell pro Terminal. Kein Parallelism (T1 hatte das schon ein Terminal-zu-Terminal-Pattern).

ancestors.title: Read Company Reference Vault, align Paperclip, and action open items
ancestors.description:
\## Task




The Obsidian Vault at \`G:\My Drive\QuantMechanica - Company Reference\\\` is the canonical single point of truth for QuantMechanica V5's identity, org, pipeline, processes, and decision rights. Read it in full and align Paperclip accordingly.




Start at \`\_HOME.md\`. Conflict resolution: filesystem > vault > Notion.




\## What to do




1\. \*\*Read the vault completely\*\* — \`\_HOME.md\`, then all sections \`01 Identity/\` through \`09 Strategy Wiki/\`. Pay particular attention to:

   - \`01 Identity/Paperclip Scope\` — IS / IS NOT definition

   - \`01 Identity/Hard Rules\` — 16 non-negotiables

   - \`02 Org/Org Structure\` + \`02 Org/Model Assignment\` (SoT for model per agent)

   - \`02 Org/New Roles - Priority Hires\`

   - \`07 Decision Rights/\` — what you may decide autonomously

   - \`\_OPEN ITEMS.md\` — outstanding items




2\. \*\*Gap analysis: Paperclip vs Vault\*\* — compare vault state against live agents (\`paperclip/data/instances/\<inst>/agents/\*/instructions/AGENTS.md\`), model assignments, heartbeat cadences, skill assignments. List all deviations.




3\. \*\*Create issues for open items\*\* — one issue per entry in \`\_OPEN ITEMS.md\` (correct role as assignee, clear acceptance criterion, evidence path).




4\. \*\*Update vault where Paperclip data deviates\*\* — e.g. if an agent has a different model or heartbeat cadence than documented. Doc-KM is your primary tool here.




5\. \*\*Org expansion\*\* — plan and initiate per \`02 Org/New Roles - Priority Hires.md\`, starting with Token Controller (Haiku 4.5), then subsequent roles. Hires require OWNER approval (not autonomous).




6\. \*\*Closeout issue to OWNER\*\* — when gap analysis, issue creation, and vault updates are complete, summarise status (what is done, what is open, which hires are next).




\## Hard scope boundary




Paperclip is exclusively a research & trading factory:

\- Strategy research → EA build → 15-phase pipeline → T6 live → DarwinexZero portfolio

\- Continuous operation (empty pipeline \= blocker, not success)

\- Public reporting only via DXZ portfolio + MyFXBook + public snapshot JSON




\*\*IS NOT\*\* (see \`01 Identity/Paperclip Scope\`):

\- No YouTube channel, no content marketing, no influencer work

\- No marketing agency, no customer acquisition beyond algo-fund investors via DXZ

\- No products other than trading strategies

\- No web shop, no SaaS




If the vault contains content on such topics (e.g. because OWNER personally runs YouTube), \*\*ignore\*\* — these are not part of Paperclip and must not result in issues, skills, or org hires.




\## Guiding principles (from vault)




\- Determinism over LLM calls (\`04 Processes/Determinism Over LLM Calls\`)

\- Each agent: exactly 1 skill, correct model, sensible heartbeat cadence

\- Daily lessons-learned loop (CEO responsibility)

\- T6 live trading toggle is OWNER + Board Advisor exclusive — you may not enable T6, only prepare deployment




\## Paths




\- Vault: \`G:\My Drive\QuantMechanica - Company Reference\\\_HOME.md\`

\- Repo spec mirror: \`C:\QM
epo\docs\ops\PIPELINE\_PHASE\_SPEC.md\`, \`framework\V5\_FRAMEWORK\_DESIGN.md\`

\- Live roster: \`C:\QM\paperclip\data\instances\\\<inst>\agents\\\*\instructions\AGENTS.md\`

\- Phase pointer: \`C:\QM\paperclip\governance\PHASE\_STATE.md\`




\## Acceptance criteria




\- Gap analysis list posted as comment in this issue

\- At least 1 issue created per \`\_OPEN ITEMS.md\` entry (correct role, clear DoD)

\- Vault updates committed (via Doc-KM)

\- Closeout comment with status + next 3 proposed hires + open OWNER decisions

\`\`\`




**---**




**## 5. Key IDs (Paperclip)**




\| What | ID |

\|------|----|

\| Company | \`03d4dcc8-4cea-4133-9f68-90c0d99628fb\` |

\| CEO | \`7795b4b0-8ecd-46da-ab22-06def7c8fa2d\` |

\| CTO | \`241ccf3c-ab68-40d6-b8eb-e03917795878\` |

\| CoS | \`38f933cd-557b-41ff-8498-30db273273ef\` |

\| Research | \`7aef7a17-d010-4f6e-a198-4a8dc5deb40d\` |




API base: \`http://127.0.0.1:3100/api\` (no auth required on loopback)




**---**




**## 6. Infrastructure notes**




**\*\*Database:\*\*** System PostgreSQL 17 on port 5432 — NOT embedded postgres.

\- Data dir: \`C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\data\`

\- Paperclip user: \`paperclip\` / password: \`paperclip\_local\`

\- Postgres superuser: \`postgres\` / password: \`paperclip\_local\`

\- Connection string: \`postgres://paperclip:paperclip\_local@localhost:5432/paperclip\`




**\*\*Backups:\*\*** SQL dumps in \`C:\QM\paperclip\data\instances\default\data\backups\\\` (hourly, 30-day retention)




**\*\*Why postgres password resets:\*\*** PostgreSQL 17 stores passwords in its data directory. After a clean reboot this should persist. If it doesn't, the password may have been reset during a PostgreSQL service update or reinstall. The fix is always the same: \`ALTER USER paperclip WITH PASSWORD 'paperclip\_local';\` as superuser.




**---**




**## 7. Open Obsidian**




If Obsidian does not start automatically:

\- Vault: \`G:\My Drive\QuantMechanica - Company Reference\\\`

\- In Obsidian: open vault → navigate to folder




**---**




*\*Updated by Board Advisor (Claude Code) — 2026-05-08\**

project.name: Portfolio Factory V5
project.description: Single project containing the entire V5 build: source research → strategy cards → EA  build → backtest baseline → quality review → T6 demo → DXZ live burn-in → portfolio expansion. Public via website + YouTube + newsletter.

goal.title: Build-in-public quant research factory; portfolio of mechanical trading strategies
goal.description: Build-in-public quant research factory; portfolio of mechanical trading strategies. 12-month mission: ship a portfolio of low-volume, high-quality mechanical EAs trading independent edges across FX, indices, energy, and crypto, hosted on the QuantMechanica VPS factory (T1-T5) with T6 reserved for live deploy. Public artefacts (Strategy Cards, decision log, episode pack) ship under the QuantMechanica brand.
